entity.summary: Native decentralized exchange and DeFi trading ecosystem on Mantle Network, providing token swaps, liquidity pools, yield farming, analytics, leveraged perpetual trading, and related on-chain trading services.
entity.notes: HEI models FusionX V2 and V3 discovery rows as one FusionX exchange entity. Current first-party documentation identifies FusionX Finance as a Mantle Network DEX/AMM and documents swap, liquidity, yield farming, analytics, perpetual trading, and other exchange functions.

evidence.title: FusionX Finance Introduction
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies FusionX Finance as a native Mantle DeFi ecosystem with an AMM and describes it as a decentralized exchange for trading and earning.

evidence.title: FusionX Finance Products
evidence.notes: Current first-party product documentation lists Exchange swap and liquidity, yield farming, analytics, leveraged perpetual trading, limit orders, and related platform functions.

evidence.title: FusionX official application website
evidence.notes: Current first-party application domain remains reachable and is the official FusionX platform entry point.
